description: A concession stand reports that their soda fountain is not working.

nodes.task_description: Log a maintenance request for the broken soda machine.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a new high-priority maintenance ticket.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a beverage technician to the stand to troubleshoot the issue.

expected_outcome.value: Agent assigns the ticket to the on-call beverage technician.

nodes.task_description: Temporarily update the digital menu board at that stand to show fountain drinks as 'unavailable'.

expected_outcome.value: Agent remotely updates the menu to prevent customer frustration.
